powerpagecomponent.name: Home
powerpagecomponent.searchcontent:
Service Intake{% assign page_title = "New service request" %} {% assign homeurl = website.adx_partialurl %}

Submit a service request

Use this secure form to describe what you need, explain the impact, attach supporting files, and see an estimated response path before you submit.

{% if user %}
Signed in {{ user.fullname | default: user.emailaddress1 | escape }} Customer account
{% endif %}
{% if user %}
Secure customer request Your request is linked to your account so you can return later and track updates.
Signed in
Step 1 of 4

Request details

Start with a short title, category, and clear description so we understand what you need.

Next: impact and urgency
Step 2 of 4

Impact and urgency

Your answers help us estimate the right team and target response time.

Step 3 of 4

Supporting files

Supporting files can be uploaded securely after your request record is created.

Upload after submission After you submit, use the Upload supporting files action on the confirmation screen. Files are saved securely with this service request.
  • Use screenshots, forms, approvals, or other evidence that explains the request.
  • The upload area is tied to the confirmation number shown after submission.
  • You can skip this step now if no files are needed.
Step 4 of 4

Review and submit

Review your details before submitting. A confirmation number will be shown when your request is received.

Routing preview Waiting for inputs

Complete category, severity, and priority to preview routing.

DepartmentPending
Target responsePending
ReviewPending
Supporting filesStandard

The final team and target response time are confirmed after you submit.

{% else %}
Secure intake

Sign in to submit a service request

Please sign in so we can link the request to your account and show only your own requests, uploaded files, and confirmation history.

Sign in to continue
Why sign in?
  • Protects your request history
  • Saves your contact details with the request
  • Lets you track updates after submission
{% endif %}
Home
